summary: NT Commerce 12.0 Iteration 65 - Testing 5 NEW robots (profit, repair, prediction, notification_bot, supplier) and 2FA frontend. All 11 robots verified working via API and displayed in frontend. 2FA endpoints work but have a bug for tenant users.

minor.issue: Returns 404 'user not found' for tenant users because it looks in main_db.users but tenant users are stored in tenant-specific database
minor.root_cause: verify_2fa() and setup_2fa() use main_db.users which doesn't contain tenant users
minor.suggested_fix: Use get_current_user's database context or tenant_db instead of main_db.users

integration_issues.issue: Clicking 'بدء الإعداد' (Start Setup) shows 'Not Found' error toast due to backend bug

action_items: Fix 2FA endpoints to work with tenant users - should look up users in tenant-specific database instead of main_db.users
critical_code_review_comments: All 5 new robots (profit, repair, prediction, notification_bot, supplier) are correctly registered and working
Robot status API returns all 11 robots as expected
Robot /run endpoints correctly execute each robot and return results
TwoFactorPage.js properly uses /api/auth/2fa/* endpoints with correct data-testid attributes
RobotsPage.js displays all 11 robots with proper status cards and controls
2FA backend bug: setup_2fa, verify_2fa, disable_2fa all use main_db.users which doesn't contain tenant users - only admin users are there

success_rate.frontend: 95% (robots page 100%, 2FA page shows bug for tenant users)

context_for_next_testing_agent: All 11 robots verified: inventory, debt, report, customer, pricing, maintenance, profit, repair, prediction, notification_bot, supplier. 2FA endpoints at /api/auth/2fa/{status,setup,verify,disable} work for admin users but fail for tenant users due to database lookup issue. Frontend pages /robots and /two-factor both load correctly. Internal chat regression passed.

robots_status_api.result: PASS - Returns all 11 robots with status

2fa_endpoints.setup: PASS - POST /api/auth/2fa/setup returns secret, qr_code, uri

frontend_twofactor_page.setup_flow: BUG - Shows 'Not Found' error for tenant users
